task_completion.description: Open the CAMEO Data Manager application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the appropriate section and open a new record form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new, blank or partially filled data entry form (e.g., under Contacts, Facilities, or Resources) is open within CAMEO Data Manager.

task_completion.description: Enter the department name and full address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields contain 'Maplewood Township Police Department' for the name, '475 Civic Center Drive' for the street, 'Maplewood' for the city, 'NJ' for the state, and '07040' for the zip code.

task_completion.description: Enter the phone number and contact person.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields contain '(973) 762-3400' for the phone number and 'Chief Robert Flanagan' for the contact person.

task_completion.description: Enter the number of officers and the specific notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields contain '47' for the number of officers/personnel and 'Primary law enforcement responder for Route 78 industrial corridor.' in the notes or comments section.
Evidence that the record has been saved, such as the form switching to a read-only view, a save confirmation message, or the new record appearing in the application's list/index.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the CAMEO Data Manager GUI being actively used (menus clicked, fields typed into), rather than terminal commands or database injection scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the details into a text editor to mock completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry must be clearly visible within the actual CAMEO Data Manager application fields, not in Notepad, TextEdit, or a similar basic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the record rather than just typing it and abandoning the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots must show the record successfully saved in the application's database view, rather than just leaving unsaved text in the input fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The city is Maplewood, state is NJ, zip code is 07040, and the main phone number is (973) 762-3400. Note that the street address (475 Civic Center Drive), contact person (Chief Robert Flanagan), and number of officers (47) provided in the task are synthetic and should be verified exactly as written in the task description.
